sectionSubtitle: Eight architectural innovations that define the Heady AI research program — each backed by provisional patent filings and rooted in geometric first principles.

features.title: CSL Engine — 7 Gate Types
features.description: Continuous Semantic Logic replaces discrete Boolean logic with a spectrum of geometric truth values. The seven gate types — THRESHOLD, AMPLIFY, SUPPRESS, ROUTE, MERGE, SPLIT, and OBSERVE — operate as vector transformations in high-dimensional space, enabling nuanced, context-aware reasoning that binary systems cannot achieve.

features.title: Sacred Geometry Architecture
features.description: Every structural parameter in the Heady platform — layer widths, attention heads, routing weights, timeout thresholds — is derived from the mathematical constants of Sacred Geometry: φ (golden ratio), π, √2, √5, and the Fibonacci sequence. This produces self-similar, harmonically stable systems that scale predictably across orders of magnitude.

features.title: φ-Scaled Everything
features.description: The golden ratio (φ = 1.618033988749895) governs resource allocation, inter-agent communication timing, vector dimensionality ratios, and scheduler intervals across the entire Heady stack. φ-scaling creates natural resonance between subsystems and eliminates arbitrary hyperparameter tuning through mathematically principled configuration.

features.title: 51 Provisional Patents
features.description: HeadySystems Inc. has filed 51 provisional patents covering the full spectrum of geometric AI innovation: CSL gate mechanics, Sacred Geometry orchestration, 3D vector memory architectures, post-quantum cryptographic integration, multi-model routing algorithms, swarm intelligence coordination, and cognitive archetype routing frameworks.

features.title: 3D Vector Space Memory
features.description: Heady's memory architecture extends beyond flat embedding vectors into a true 3D semantic space where memories are indexed by semantic content, temporal recency, and contextual relevance simultaneously. Powered by pgvector with custom φ-scaled distance metrics, this enables associative recall that mirrors biological cognitive architecture.

features.title: PQC Security — Kyber-768 / Dilithium2
features.description: All agent-to-agent communication and data at rest within the Heady platform is secured with NIST-standardized post-quantum cryptographic algorithms: CRYSTALS-Kyber-768 for key encapsulation and CRYSTALS-Dilithium2 for digital signatures. Heady is quantum-safe by design, not by retrofit.

features.title: Multi-Model Routing
features.description: The Heady orchestration layer dynamically routes inference requests across multiple AI model providers — OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Mistral, and local models — using CSL gate logic to select the optimal model based on task semantics, latency requirements, cost constraints, and contextual domain expertise.

features.title: Cognitive Archetype Framework
features.description: The seven cognitive archetypes — Owl (wisdom/analysis), Eagle (vision/strategy), Dolphin (communication/empathy), Rabbit (agility/execution), Ant (coordination/labor), Elephant (memory/retention), and Beaver (construction/building) — define distinct agent behavioral profiles that map to specialized neural activation patterns within the CSL gate system.
